description:
The import process for several key papers in your library was interrupted, leaving them with incomplete author lists. Fix these citations by adding the missing co-authors to the following papers:

- 'Attention Is All You Need': Add Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, and Jakob Uszkoreit (in that order) after Vaswani.
- 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition': Add Xiangyu Zhang, Shaoqing Ren, and Jian Sun.
- 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids': Add Francis H.C. Crick.
- 'Generative Adversarial Nets': Add Jean Pouget-Abadie and Mehdi Mirza.

targets.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
